records.question: Which VIP accounts named 162 have refunds of at least 1931.76 on 2018-03-24 12:08:55 using cards exactly 4539333582760 that were valid from at most 2012-05-22 02:05:41 and valid to at least 2018-02-25 15:43:32?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
JOIN financial_transactions ON accounts.account_id = financial_transactions.account_id
JOIN customers_cards ON financial_transactions.card_id = customers_cards.card_id
WHERE customers_cards.other_card_details = '4539333582760' AND accounts.account_name = '162' AND financial_transactions.transaction_type = 'Refund' AND financial_transactions.transaction_date = '2018-03-24 12:08:55' AND customers_cards.date_valid_to >= '2018-02-25 15:43:32' AND financial_transactions.transaction_amount >= 1931.76 AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' AND customers_cards.date_valid_from <= '2012-05-22 02:05:41'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id 
FROM Accounts AS accounts 
JOIN Financial_Transactions AS transactions ON accounts.account_id = transactions.account_id 
JOIN Customers_Cards AS cards ON transactions.card_id = cards.card_id 
WHERE accounts.account_name = '162' 
AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' 
AND transactions.transaction_type = 'Refund' 
AND transactions.transaction_date = '2018-03-24 12:08:55' 
AND transactions.transaction_amount >= 1931.76 
AND cards.other_card_details = '4539333582760' 
AND cards.date_valid_to >= '2018-02-25 15:43:32' 
AND cards.date_valid_from <= '2012-05-22 02:05:41'

records.question: Which accounts have other account details that are exactly VIP?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
WHERE accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP'
records.pred_sql: SELECT account_id FROM Accounts WHERE other_account_details = 'VIP'

records.question: Which VIP accounts named 725 have payments made on or after 2018-03-24 06:41:41 using card number 4560596484842?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
JOIN financial_transactions ON accounts.account_id = financial_transactions.account_id
JOIN customers_cards ON financial_transactions.card_id = customers_cards.card_id
WHERE financial_transactions.transaction_type = 'Payment' AND accounts.account_name = '725' AND financial_transactions.transaction_date >= '2018-03-24 06:41:41' AND customers_cards.card_number = '4560596484842' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id 
FROM Accounts AS accounts 
JOIN Financial_Transactions AS transactions ON accounts.account_id = transactions.account_id 
JOIN Customers_Cards AS cards ON transactions.card_id = cards.card_id 
WHERE accounts.account_name = '725' 
AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' 
AND transactions.transaction_type = 'Payment' 
AND transactions.transaction_date >= '2018-03-24 06:41:41' 
AND cards.card_number = '4560596484842' 
GROUP BY accounts.account_id

records.question: Which accounts have transactions on or after 2018-03-24 14:47:05 using a card where the other card details is exactly 6011771512810699?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.account_id FROM accounts
JOIN financial_transactions ON accounts.account_id = financial_transactions.account_id
JOIN customers_cards ON financial_transactions.card_id = customers_cards.card_id
WHERE financial_transactions.transaction_date >= '2018-03-24 14:47:05' AND customers_cards.other_card_details = '6011771512810699'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT accounts.account_id
FROM Accounts AS accounts
JOIN Financial_Transactions AS transactions ON accounts.account_id = transactions.account_id
JOIN Customers_Cards AS cards ON transactions.card_id = cards.card_id
WHERE transactions.transaction_date >= '2018-03-24 14:47:05'
AND cards.other_card_details = '6011771512810699'
